## Technical Expertise
- **Frontend Core:** React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Three.js
- **Backend Core:** Node.js, Express.js, Ballerina, Python, System Architecture, RESTful APIs
- **Databases:** Relational (SQL), NoSQL
- **Domains:** Responsive Web Design, Cybersecurity Analytics, Performance Optimization, and SEO/AIO.
